changes: Speed: Registration click speed should be improved
Speed: Participant checklist item selector should be MUCH faster
Multi Window: Now opens 4 windows at once for (hopefully) better chance of registration

updates.title: Test Update
changes: The latest change now slides in from the side when you open the page — you're reading it.
Dismiss it with ✕, then tap the ✦ button any time to read it again.
Fully client-side: the changelog ships inside the app, no server call.

updates.title: Credentials stay local
changes: creds.json is no longer tracked by git and is covered by .gitignore.
Login + activity code still prefill from this browser only (localStorage), never the server.

updates.title: Steadier login
changes: Reworked the auth flow so a flaky login surfaces on the banner instead of silently stalling.

updates.title: Faster booking run
changes: Trimmed the booker's path to the register click for a quicker grab the instant a slot opens.
